case_title: IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION VS. CAMBODIAN BUDDHIST TEMPLE/NISSAY SAN et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-16-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S STATEMENT OF ASSETS. FILED BY DEFENDANT CAMBODIAN BUDDHIST TEMPLE/NISSAY SAN

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CAMBODIAN BUDDHIST TEMPLE/NISSAY SAN FLYING CAT LLC (MARETH CHAN, AGENT) THE CAMBODIAN BUDDHIST TEMPLE/ABBOT CHANTHO CHOY THE CAMBODIAN BUDDHIST TEMMPLE/PECH SAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMBODIAN BUDDHIST TEMPLE/NISSAY SAN THE CAMBODIAN BUDDHIST TEMMPLE/PECH SAN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,175.00, ABBOT CHANTHO, MERETH CHAN AND FLYING CAT, LLC ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$75.00) POS SERVED ON INDIVIDUAL(N. SAN) NOT ON COMPANY(CAMBODIAN BUDDHIST TEMPLE) SERVED JAN-24-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAMBODIAN BUDDHIST TEMPLE/NISSAY SAN
